query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(TABLE_NAME ORDER BY TABLE_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') as tables_with_gestanteId FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME = 'gestanteId';
